enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request comparing Uber to taxis, expressing clear preference for Uber as a convenient, practical service using regular cars. He briefly recalls a memory from Boulder around 2004 where he drove friends home, connecting it to the Uber concept, and spontaneously considers becoming an Uber driver himself.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Uber is clearly better and will put taxis out of business
Seriously considers it on the spot as a money-making idea
